github_workflows.name: freeze CONFIRM v3.4 preregistration
github_workflows.access_boundary: public DEV and split metadata only

github_workflows.name: neural CONFIRM v3.4 one-shot
github_workflows.input: the exact Release tag emitted by order 1
github_workflows.access_boundary: CONFIRM access only after preflight and access receipt

open_pre_access_order: verify freeze, split-lock, v3.3 manifest, and this order contract
replay the frozen Q1 kernel against the exact public DEV v3.3 outputs
create or validate the immutable confirm-v3.4-access receipt
resolve and validate the exact active CONFIRM manifest
freeze_policy: The freeze workflow refuses to run if any confirm-v3.4-freeze-* Release or the confirm-v3.4-access receipt already exists.
rerun_policy: Only a GitHub rerun with the original run ID and identical provenance may resume; a new dispatch is refused after the access receipt exists.
